content: Routing-quality slice: incorporated the supplied Connection Port Assignment / Orthogonal Edge Routing algorithm into the existing routeEdges pipeline without replacing the whole router. New behavior groups half-edges by (node, face), iteratively re-sorts by partner port coordinates, distributes same-face ports at readable intervals, and widens internal/SVG parallel lanes (layout channel spacing 14, SVG lane spacing 12). Added regression coverage for same-side port ordering/spacing and updated the lane-spacing expectation. Verification: npx tsc --noEmit, npm test (227 passing), npm run build. Existing untracked reports/ was left untouched. Next: visually smoke the localhost sample areas that previously showed excessive bends/edge-lane crowding, then continue remaining routing polish only where visible regressions remain.
